sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id UInt64, geom MultiPolygon) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE geo_test SET geom = readWKTMultiPolygon('MULTIPOLYGON(((1 1,3 3,3 1,1 1)))') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toTypeName(geom) AS geom_type FROM geo_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT geom FROM geo_test WHERE geom = readWKTMultiPolygon('MULTIPOLYGON(((2 2,4 4,4 2,2 2)))');
